commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh I will utterly consume all things from off the land, says the LORD. Gather That is, I will assuredly take away and wholly consume, either by captivity or death, both men and beasts out of this land. (Challoner) To gather commonly implies a benefit, but the sequel shows that the contrary is here meant. (Worthington) It often signifies to kill or bury, Jeremias viii. The whole country round Judea to Babylon, shall be a sepulchre for men and beasts, Osee iv.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Gathering, I will gather: That is, I will assuredly take away, and wholly consume, either by captivity, or death, both men and beasts out of this land.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
